data.name: OUTCASTS 2: THE BOOK OF THE DEAD
data.detailed_description:
Rising from the waters, from the forests, from long-sealed tombs cut into the permafrost, the Dead have come to Kemskaya Volost.

Volk and Tatyana must once again face an impossible challenge to the village of Sosnovka, this time battling an undead horde as they hunt down the rogue wizard Carpenter.

OUTCASTS 2: THE BOOK OF THE DEAD is the fourth game in Kamti’s Conussia series, featuring new locations in the village of Sosnovka, new monsters to battle and an entire new Mirror Realm, where ancient undead mummies clash with decadent, hedonistic mortals. Against all this, the arrival of a mysterious Priest of the Holy Orthodox Order threatens the uneasy alliance between the proud Countess Natascha and the brooding vampire queen Odette.

OUTCASTS 2: THE BOOK OF THE DEAD features all new village management mechanics, expanded combat and new areas to explore.

The winter of Kemskaya Volost is harsh and cold, but its people beautiful, and its beds warm…

What you get with your purchase

  • ~7 hours of story-driven gameplay (single-player).

  • Choices matter: branching scenes and quest outcomes that affect later events.

  • Turn-based combat with status effects, weaknesses, and boss encounters.

  • Village management: gather resources, upgrade Sosnovka, and unlock services.

  • New areas: fresh locations in Sosnovka and Bhardadi, plus the new Mirror Realm: Tasu Qupye.

  • New content: monsters, items, quests, and characters (including a mysterious Priest).

  • Adult content (18+): multiple explicit, narrative-integrated sex scenes.

data.short_description: Rising from the waters, from the forests, from long-sealed tombs cut into the permafrost, the Dead have come to Kemskaya Volost. Volk and Tatyana must once again face an impossible challenge to the village of Sosnovka, this time battling an undead horde as they hunt down the rogue wizard Carpenter.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (4th Gen) or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (Intel HD 4000 or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 5 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX
  • 備註: Mouse, keyboard or controller. SSD recommended for smoother loading.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 (6th Gen) or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU (NVIDIA GTX 950 or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any modern sound device
  • 備註: Gamepad support enabled. Compatible with Steam Deck.
